name: Sasindu Wijewardana
title: Undergraduate | Full-Stack Developer
subtitle: React • Node.js • Spring Boot
bio: Software engineering undergraduate at the University of Moratuwa. I specialize in building responsive, clean full-stack web applications and enjoy exploring DevOps pipelines and cloud deployments. Currently seeking an internship opportunity in IT.
aboutDescription: I am a software engineering undergraduate student at the University of Moratuwa, Sri Lanka. I have a strong foundation in full-stack web development, working primarily with React, Node.js, and Spring Boot. I enjoy setting up simple DevOps workflows and learning about cloud structures. I focus on learning by building hands-on projects, collaborating in hackathons, and constantly refining my core coding practices.
